testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 Full Lifecycle E2E Test › should execute a complete mission lifecycle from UI
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › acos.spec.ts:4:3 › ACOS 2.0 Full Lifecycle E2E Test › should execute a complete mission lifecycle from UI
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('button:has-text("Mission Generator")').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Mission Generator")').first()
8 | // Click the "Mission Generator" sidebar button to navigate to the cockpit 9 | const missionGeneratorTab = page.locator('button:has-text("Mission Generator")').first(); > 10 | await expect(missionGeneratorTab).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 11 | await missionGeneratorTab.click(); 12 | 13 | // Wait for the main input to be visible (using its placeholder to avoid matching the Copilot input in the sidebar) at /app/applet/tests/e2e/acos.spec.ts:10:39
attachment #1: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/acos-ACOS-2-0-Full-Lifecyc-ed0fe-e-mission-lifecycle-from-UI-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../../test-results/acos-ACOS-2-0-Full-Lifecyc-ed0fe-e-mission-lifecycle-from-UI-chromium/error-context.md
